title: taraxacum flumineum
intro: Taraxacum flumineum, also known as the river dandelion, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family, Asteraceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum flumineum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce blood pressure, and help alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. Taraxacum flumineum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
